title: ToolTreaux 19pc Dual Sided Stainless Steel Wax Clay Carving Pick and Spatula Set
description:
Does your next craft project need that extra something to make it extra special? This dual-sided stainless steel carving set has 19 options of picks or spatulas that will give your project what it needs. Each carving tool is dual side giving you may options for craving, sculpting, molding, shaping, and more! Set includes a carrying case to keep the set organized and give you a place to store your tools when they are not in use. With the options of tools you can use, you will be able to sculpt, carve, create, and more!

Our Store

ToolTreaux 19pc Dual Sided Stainless Steel Wax Clay Carving Pick and Spatula Set

The ToolTreaux deluxe set of wax carvers features 19 different double-ended spatula tools for a variety of crafting uses like sculpting, carving, picking, jewelry making, make up special effects and more. Each set comes with 38 assorted tips that make the ultimate set of multi-tools for precision work crafting projects.

Key Features

  • 19 DOUBLE ENDED TOOLS/38 PRECISION TIPS - Complete deluxe set includes 19 dual-sided carving, pick, and spatula tools, giving you 38 unique tips for detailed sculpting, shaping, smoothing, and refining across a wide range of crafting applications.
  • DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL CONSTRUCTION - Crafted from high-quality, rust-resistant stainless steel for long-lasting performance with both wet and dry mediums; corrosion-resistant material ensures reliable use project after project.
  • PERFECT FOR MULTIPLE CRAFTING USES - Ideal for wax carving, clay sculpting, ceramics, jewelry making, modeling, mold detailing, cleaning small parts, and special effects work - an essential multi-tool set for hobbyists and professionals alike.
  • COMFORTABLE, NON-SLIP GRIP HANDLES - Ergonomically shaped handles provide balance, control, and comfort during precision work, helping reduce hand fatigue while preventing slipping for safer, more accurate results.
  • COMPACT & ORGANIZED STORAGE - Each tool measures approximately 6.5 inches for easy handling and fits neatly into the included PVC storage pouch, making transport and organization simple within standard craft boxes or tool kits.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TTX-R59FK-F
  • UPC: 0652997061764
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: 6.5 in

These spatula tools are constructed of durable, high-quality stainless steel that won’t rust, making them ideal for use with both wet and dry mediums. The corrosion-resistant material will ensure a long life for your tools (just make sure to wipe them clean and dry them before you put them away).

Originally designed for precision work, these craft-specific pick tools are great for cleaning small parts, carving wax, creating designs, modeling, molding and smoothing. Some recommended mediums for spatula pick tools are ceramics, jewelry and clay.

Featuring gripped handles, these tools are shaped for comfort and balance to prevent slippage during use, protecting your hands from the picks. Each tool measures about 6.5” in length, and the entire set will easily fit inside most standard tool boxes and craft storage containers. We’ve also included a PVC storage pouch to keep them all safe and organized when not in use.
